name: codegraph_design_gaps
description: Find things described in an indexed design doc that don't exist in the code yet. Extracts backtick-wrapped identifiers from the doc and returns ONLY those not found in the code graph. Each gap includes the heading-path context showing which section of the doc describes the missing item. USE WHEN: checking what's left to implement from a design doc, or building a TODO list from an architecture spec.

source.description: Source file path of the indexed doc to check for gaps (as shown by codegraph_list_doc_sources).
